description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 23, 2026 (Reiwa 8), Hanno City Library held an unveiling ceremony for a Moomin Papa object.

This object, installed as the third in a series following those at Hanno Station and Higashi-Hanno Station, will further promote "town-building that makes people want to walk," starting from these three locations. The goal is to energize the city center, activate the entire city, and foster civic pride among residents.

At the ceremony, Moomin Stories Co., Ltd. donated a Moomin pop-up picture book titled "A Long Journey to Moomin Valley," and Seibu Railway Co., Ltd. donated Seibu Railway vehicle Plarail (toy trains). These gifts will be used at the library for everyone to enjoy.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/kikakuka/sangakukanrenkei/13477.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City Library unveils new Moomin Papa object
